{{- /* Open Graph + Twitter Card tags. Rendered per page from head.html (cached by .Path), so values vary per page. Share image: per-page front matter `images` (first entry) if set, otherwise the site image stamped with the overlay and resized to a 1200 square via img/overlay.html. */ -}} {{- $title := cond .IsHome site.Title .Title }} {{- $description := or .Description site.Params.description }} {{- with partialCached "img/og-image.html" . }} {{- else }} {{- end }}
